creator: tobez@tobez.org
text:
On Mon, Jul 16, 2001 at 05:30:01AM -0700, Chris Faulhaber wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/29003; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: Chris Faulhaber <jedgar@fxp.org>
> To: Andreas Schulz <ats@first.gmd.de>
> Cc: freebsd-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org
> Subject: Re: ports/29003: ports/graphics/Cgraph has a checksum error
> Date: Mon, 16 Jul 2001 08:24:54 -0400
> 
>  On Mon, Jul 16, 2001 at 05:13:50AM -0700, Andreas Schulz wrote:
>  > 
>  > ports/graphics/Cgraph the distinfo is old, but the tar-package
>  > seems to be repackaged.
>  > 
>  
>  a) you might want to inform the maintainer

Yep, I noticed this PR, thanks.

>  b) the new distfile is corrupt:
>  
>  jedgar@darkstar:~$ tar ztvf /usr/ports/distfiles/Cgraph2.04.tar.gz
>  gzip: stdin: not in gzip format
>  tar: child returned status 1
>  jedgar@darkstar:~$ file /usr/ports/distfiles/Cgraph2.04.tar.gz
>  /usr/ports/distfiles/Cgraph2.04.tar.gz: data
>  
>  so updating the checksum might be a bad idea.

I contacted the webmaster of the distribution site;  if they do not have
a good backup copy they can fetch one from any FreeBSD mirror.  :-)

=Anton.
-- 
May the tuna salad be with you.
